step.title: Invoke memory-hygiene protocol
step.action: Identify stale entries (not referenced in 30+ days), conflicting entries, oversized entries, and duplicates.

step.title: Present findings
step.action: Present a summary of findings to the user: total entries, stale count, conflict count, size warnings.
For each issue, recommend an action: archive, merge, trim, or delete.

step.title: Apply user-selected actions
step.action: Ask the user which actions to apply.
Execute selected cleanup actions on _symphony/_memory/ entries.
Report final state: entries remaining, space reclaimed.
